articles.excerpt: Training tool-use agents to improve from their own experience remains challenging, as supervised fine-tuning relies on fixed teacher-distilled trajectories, while sparse-reward reinforcement learning provides weak supervision for long-horizon interactions. articles.summary: DeepSearch-Evolve 采用自蒸馏方法，让工具使用 agent 在可验证环境中从自身搜索轨迹中学习，解决了监督微调依赖固定轨迹和稀疏奖励 RL 弱监督的问题。

articles.title: SWE-Pruner Pro: The Coder LLM Already Knows What to Prune
articles.excerpt: Pruning long context for coding agents has been a vital technology for efficient context management. articles.title: Xiaomi-Robotics-1: Scaling Vision-Language-Action Models with over 100K Hours of Real-World Trajectories
articles.excerpt: We present Xiaomi-Robotics-1, a foundational vision-language-action (VLA) model capable of (1) following diverse language instructions to perform a wide range of mobile manipulation tasks in unseen environments out-of-the-box, and (2) efficiently adapting to novel downstream tasks with minimal fine-
articles.summary: Xiaomi-Robotics-1 是基于 10 万小时真实世界轨迹训练的基础 VLA 模型，能零样本执行多样移动操作指令并在新环境中泛化，同时高效适应下游任务。

articles.title: HOMIE: Human-object Centric Video Personalization via Multimodal Intelligent Enchancement
articles.excerpt: Human-object centric video personalization (HOCVP) is a core task within subject-driven video generation. However, existing methods suffer from two key limitations. articles.summary: HOMIE 通过多模态智能增强实现人-物中心视频个性化，解决了现有方法在主体保真度和一致性之间的平衡难题，提升了视频个性化生成质量。

articles.title: Apple-π: Benchmarking Thinking with Video Towards Law-Grounded Physical Intelligence
articles.excerpt: Modern video generation models are increasingly hailed as emerging world models with an internalized grasp of physical law. articles.title: RynnBrain 1.1: Towards More Capable and Generalizable Embodied Foundation Model
articles.excerpt: We present RynnBrain 1.1, a family of embodied foundation models spanning 2B, 9B, and 122B-A10B scales. articles.summary: RynnBrain 1.1 是一系列具身基础模型（2B–122B-A10B），采用统一时空物理框架训练，支持感知、空间推理、定位与规划，相比 1.0 版本能力显著提升。

articles.title: GigaChat Audio: Time-aware Large Audio Language Model
articles.excerpt: Temporal grounding in long recordings remains challenging for audio-conditioned LLMs. We present a time-aware audio LLM that answers questions with explicit timestamps over up to 120 minutes of input. articles.summary: GigaChat Audio 是时间感知的音频大语言模型，通过插入周期性时间标记与连续音频 token，支持长达 120 分钟的输入，并给出带精确时间戳的问答。

articles.title: FlowMimic: Mask-free Visual Editing and Generation with Pixel-pair Warped Flow Field for Online Video Editing Data Generation and Modality Mimicry

articles.title: ReflectWorld-MM: An Entity-Oriented Multimodal Memory System for Open-Ended Video Streams

articles.summary: ReflectWorld-MM 构建面向实体的多模态记忆系统，用于开放式视频流，使 agent 能够持续观看、记忆和推理，解决了现有系统在长期视频记忆上的不足。

articles.title: Group Entropy-Controlled Policy Optimization

articles.title: Qwen-Music Technical Report

articles.summary: Qwen-Music 是一个强大的音乐生成模型，支持文本到音乐和参考音频到音乐两条任务，能生成高保真度、完整人声演唱的歌曲。

articles.title: Environment-free Synthetic Data Generation for API-Calling Agents
articles.excerpt: Training API-calling large language model (LLM) agents demands massive amounts of high-quality trajectories. articles.summary: 在 ALFWorld 上比较 Muon 与 AdamW 优化器在 agentic RL 中的表现，发现 Muon 在特定稀疏奖励设定下具有优势，为后训练优化器选择提供了参考。

articles.title: DiffGI: Differentiable Geometry Images for High-Fidelity Thin-Shell 3D Generation
